title: epistylium axillare
intro: Epistylium axillare is a type of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as the wood violet or Chinese violet. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epistylium axillare include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Epistylium axillare can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
